name: List catalog brands

targetRestContract.notes: Returns all CatalogBrand rows with no filtering or pagination — full table scan every time. No request parameters of any kind.

notes: The actual location of this file is src/PublicApi/CatalogBrandEndpoints/CatalogBrandListEndpoint.cs — not the CatalogItemEndpoints folder as the command argument stated.
CatalogBrand.Brand (entity property) is mapped to CatalogBrandDto.Name via AutoMapper ForMember in MappingProfile.cs — the Java target must map brand.brand to dto.name explicitly.
No filtering, no pagination, no path parameters — always returns the entire CatalogBrands table.
AutoMapper is used (unlike the get-by-id and delete endpoints which construct DTOs manually).
BlazorAdmin calls this to populate brand dropdowns in create/edit forms.
